aboutPage.title: About PlantyHub
aboutPage.lead: We believe everyone deserves fresh herbs at home — no garden, no soil and no green thumb required.
aboutPage.story1: PlantyHub began in a small kitchen in Pazardzhik, Bulgaria, with one idea: make it effortless to grow real, fresh flavour indoors — all year round.
aboutPage.story2: Today our smart gardens and pre-seeded pods help thousands of homes across Europe harvest fresh herbs and spices in weeks — with nothing but water, light and a little love.

quality.title: Quality first
quality.text: Durable gardens and reliable pods, tested to sprout and thrive.

sustainability.title: Kind to the planet
sustainability.text: Non-GMO seeds, recyclable materials and water-smart growing.

simplicity.title: Truly simple
simplicity.text: Designed so anyone can grow — clear guides and full automation.

supportPage.subtitle: Answers to the questions we hear most — plus every way to reach our team.

shipping.title: Shipping

faqItems.q: How do I track my order?
faqItems.a: You'll get a tracking link by email as soon as your order ships. Orders leave our warehouse within 24 hours on business days.
Not happy? Return your garden within 30 days for a full refund — no questions asked.
Every HomeGarder One comes with a 2-year warranty against manufacturing defects. Just contact us with your order number.

faqItems.q: My pods aren't sprouting — what should I do?
faqItems.a: Most pods sprout within 1–2 weeks. Check that the tank has water, the light is on and the room is warm. Still stuck? Email us and we'll replace them free.

faqItems.q: Do you offer bulk or wholesale orders?
faqItems.a: Yes — email support@plantyhub.com and we'll help with larger or business orders.

cilantro.name: Cilantro Seed Pods

dill.name: Dill Seed Pods

arugula.name: Arugula Seed Pods
arugula.description: Bold, peppery leaves that add a fresh kick to salads, pizzas and sandwiches. Fast-growing and cut-and-come-again.

easy.title: Easy
easy.text: No soil, no mess — just insert and grow.

steps: Drop the pod into your garden.
Snip a fresh harvest in weeks.

faqItems.q: Do I need any gardening experience?
faqItems.a: None at all. Drop in a pod, add water and nutrients, and the LED runs on an automatic 16/8 cycle. The pod guides walk you through every step.

faqItems.q: How long until my first harvest?
faqItems.a: Most herbs and spices are ready to pick in about 2–3 weeks, and keep producing for months afterwards.

faqItems.q: How much electricity does it use?
faqItems.a: Very little — the full-spectrum LED is as efficient as a couple of household bulbs, roughly a few euros a month.

faqItems.q: What can I grow in it?
faqItems.a: Basil, mint, parsley, cilantro, dill, arugula and more — 12 pods at once. Any HomeGarder pod fits the slots.

faqItems.q: Is it covered by a warranty?
faqItems.a: Yes — a 2-year warranty plus a 30-day money-back guarantee if it's not for you.
We ship across Bulgaria, the Balkans and the European Union, with dispatch within 24 hours.
